file_insights.description: GraphQL resolvers for Brand, Mention, Recommendation, Audit, and Content with added error handling
key_changes: Added try-catch blocks to all field resolvers
Introduced standardized error messages for database queries

patterns_discovered: Consistent error handling pattern in GraphQL resolvers
Fallback error message generation for database query failures
Safe error logging with descriptive messages
Graceful error propagation in GraphQL field resolvers
gotchas_discovered: Potential performance overhead from multiple sequential database queries
Complex calculation of aggregate scores like geoScore and stats
Need for null/undefined checks in database result processing

approach_outcome.error_handling_coverage: Complete for Brand and Mention resolvers

recommendations: Consider implementing a centralized error handling mechanism
Add more granular error types for different database query scenarios
Implement instrumentation or tracing for database query performance
Create a standardized error response format for GraphQL resolvers
